---
title: "ar1"
generated: true
description: "Discrete AR(1) within-group correlation (`nlme` `corAR1`)."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.stats.lme`](../nitrix-stats-lme.qmd)

*Re-exported here; defined in `nitrix.stats.lme._corr`.*

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:ar1 -->
```python
ar1() -> CorrSpec
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:ar1 -->
Discrete AR(1) within-group correlation (`nlme` `corAR1`).

The correlation matrix is $R_{ij} = \rho^{|i - j|}$ over the
time-ordered observations.  Here $\rho$ may be negative (an
oscillating process), so it is parameterised as
$\rho = \tanh(\text{raw}) \in (-1, 1)$.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:ar1 -->
**Parameters**

*No parameters.*

**Returns** `CorrSpec`. A correlation structure whose whitener applies the innovations recurrence with the constant coefficient $\phi_t = \rho$.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
